# Fuel Tracks Technologies

> Smart GPS & Fuel Monitoring

Track vehicles, monitor fuel and manage your entire fleet in real-time — built for India's toughest conditions.

## Products & Solutions
- Real-time GPS Tracking
- Fuel Level Sensors
- AIS-140 VLTD Devices
- Dash Cameras
- School Bus Tracking
